2606.23283.title: Towards Root Memories: Benchmarking and Enhancing Implicit Logical Memory Retrieval for Personalized LLMs
2606.23283.paper_summary: Memory systems are essential for personalized Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing retrieval methods in these systems primarily rely on semantic similarity, potentially missing logically critical memories with limited semantic overlap. Current benchmarks remain inadequate for evaluating this problem. To address this gap, we construct IMLogic, the first high-quality benchmark targeting implicit logical memory retrieval in long-dialogue scenarios. Motivated by this challenge, we introduce root memory, a structured, decision-preserving representation that distills reusable personalized logic from long-term user histories. We then propose RootMem, a plug-and-play framework that first distills raw histories into structured root memories and then uses an LLM-based router to activate logically relevant ones, complementing semantic retrieval with personalized decision logic. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RootMem significantly outperforms the strongest retrieval baselines and consistently boosts the accuracy of existing memory agents. Our benchmark and codes will be available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IMLogic-DBB3.
2606.23283.paper_summary_zh: 記憶系統對於個性化大型語言模型（LLMs）至關重要。<lb/>然而，這些系統中現有的檢索方法主要依賴於語義相似性，可能會錯過邏輯上關鍵的記憶，因為它們的語義重疊有限。<lb/>目前的基準仍然不足以評估這個問題。<lb/>為了解決這個空白，我們構建了IMLogic，這是首個針對長對話場景中隱式邏輯記憶檢索的高質量基準。<lb/>受到這一挑戰的啟發，我們引入了根記憶，一種結構化的、保留決策的表示方式，從長期用戶歷史中提煉出可重用的個性化邏輯。<lb/>然後，我們提出了RootMem，一個即插即用的框架，首先將原始歷史提煉為結構化的根記憶，然後使用基於LLM的路由器來激活邏輯上相關的記憶，從而用個性化的決策邏輯補充語義檢索。<lb/>大量實驗表明，RootMem顯著超越了最強的檢索基準，並持續提升現有記憶代理的準確性。<lb/>我們的基準和代碼將在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/IMLogic-DBB3 上提供。
2606.23283.author: Hongxun Ding et.al.
2606.23283.authors: Hongxun Ding, Xiang Yu, Chengbing Wang, Jianfei Xiao, Keqin Bao, Wenjie Wang, Xiangnan He
